title: Bulk import assets
description: Download the template, fill it in, then upload to validate before importing.

template.title: Step 1 — Download template
template.hint: Use the provided template so columns and formats match the system.
template.downloadError: Could not download the template, please try again.

upload.title: Step 2 — Upload file
upload.atomicHint: All-or-nothing import: assets are created only when every row is valid.

review.title: Step 3 — Validation result
review.mustFix: The file still has errors. Since the import is all-or-nothing, fix every error and re-upload.
review.willImport: All {{count}} rows are valid. Ready to import.

done.title: Import complete
done.successHint: New assets have been created. Rows with an owner also created a handover pending acknowledgement.

errors.fileRequired: Please choose a file before validating.
errors.validateFailed: File validation failed, please try again.
errors.confirmFailed: Import failed. An asset code may have just been taken — please re-validate.

code.IMPORT_OWNER_MISSING_ASSIGNED_DATE: Owner set but assigned date missing
code.IMPORT_STAGING_NOT_FOUND: Import session expired, please re-validate the file
code.IMPORT_MISSING_IMPORT_ID: Missing import session id, please re-validate the file
